creator: mhugo@dataphone.net
text:
We are running a heavily trafficed ypserver (4000 users with webdirs, ftp,etc).

Running 2.1.6 ypserv was no problem at all. We upgraded yesterday to 2.2-stable, and the problems apeared immidiatly.

How-To-Repeat: Just start ypserv and wait for 2-40 minutes, then it exits with signal 11 and dumps core.
